done_summary:
Produced three audience-tailored rewrites of the Friday incident memo:

1. **ceo_brief.md** (241/250 words) — Executive board-prep read covering outage summary, impact scope (11,400 accounts, 28 enterprise), the "second incident in 90 days" board signal, and 4 key remediations. No engineering jargon, no named individuals.

2. **customer_email.md** (282/350 words) — Warm, accountable mass email with plain-language root cause, remediation commitments, explicit SLA credit offer, and contact path. No named engineer, no "second outage in 90 days" framing, no jargon.

3. **legal_summary.md** (303/400 words) — Dispassionate factual record for counsel with exact incident window (14:11–18:24 UTC), account breakdown, 99.9% SLA breach analysis, 4 downstream-automation cases, and credit-handling recommendations. No speculation, no named employees, no marketing language.

All rewrites sourced exclusively from the draft memo with no invented facts. Supporting ADR and working notes included.
